prompt: Plot Eli Lilly and Company's (LLY) quarterly revenue actual vs estimated and EPS actual vs estimated over the last 8 quarters as dual lines on two panels, and chart the revenue surprise % next to the EPS surprise % per quarter so I can see whether LLY's beats are driven by revenue strength or by margin/expansion.
expectedReason: homepage showcase categorical charts need multi-row comparisons
responsePreview:
# Eli Lilly (LLY) — Earnings Surprise Analysis (Last 8 Quarters)

The chart was generated successfully. It has two panels:

**Top panel** – Dual line pairs for revenue (actual vs. estimated, in $B) and EPS (actual vs. estimated, in $/share) across Q3 2024 → Q2 2026.  
**Bottom panel** – Revenue surprise % (orange bars) alongside EPS surprise % (blue bars) for each quarter.

---

### Key takeaways from the data

| Quarter | Rev. Actual ($B) | Rev. Estimate ($B) | Rev. Surprise % | EPS Actual | EPS Estimate | EPS Surprise % |

| Q3 2024 | 11.30 | 9.98 | **+13.2%** | $3.92 | $2.60 | **+50.8%** |
| Q4 2024 | 11.44 | 12.10 | **−5.4%** (miss) | $1.18 | $1.47 | **−19.7%** (miss) |
| Q1 2025 | 13.53 | — | **N/A** ⚠️ | $5.32 | $5.03 | +5.8% |
| Q2 2025 | 12.73 | 12.67 | +0.5% | $3.34 | $3.26 | +2.5% |
| Q3 2025 | 15.56 | 14.70 | +5.8% | $6.31 | $5.60 | +12.7% |
| Q4 2025 | 17.60 | 16.05 | +9.6% | $7.02 | $5.69 | +23.4% |
| Q1 2026 | 19.29 | 17.94 | +7.5% | $7.54 | $6.91 | +9.1% |
| Q2 2026 | 19.80 | 17.82 | +11.1% | $8.55 | $6.97 | +22.7% |

**Surprise record:** 6 out of 7 measure...
